title: satureja varia subsp. rupestris
intro: Satureja varia subsp. rupestris, also known as mountain savory, is a subspecies of the Satureja varia plant, native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. This perennial herb has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of mountain savory include its ability to aid digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate respiratory problems. Mountain savory can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, essential oils, and capsules, allowing users to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
